[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 010000000 1
2 000000100 1
3 000100010 2
4 000010010 2
5 001110010 4
6 000101000 2
7 001010000 2

01 10 101000000 2
12 21 000000100 1 match 2
23 32 000000110 2
34 43 000010010 2 match 4
45 54 000110010 3
56 65 000110010 3
67 76 001100000 2
70 07 011000000 2

02 20 010000000 1 match 1
13 31 000000100 1 match 2
24 42 000100010 2 match 3
35 53 000010010 2 match 4
46 64 001110010 4 match 5
57 75 000101000 2 match 6
60 06 001010000 2 match 7
71 17 001000100 2

03 30 000010000 1
14 41 001000000 1
25 52 000100010 2 match 3
36 63 000010010 2 match 4
47 74 001100000 2
50 05 000010000 1
61 16 001000000 1
72 27 010100100 3

04 40 001010000 2 match 7
15 51 000000000 a match 0
26 62 000100010 2 match 3
37 73 000000100 1 match 2
